p.data-narration: Data encryption is the process of converting plaintext data into unreadable ciphertext to protect it from unauthorized access.

div.p: Data encryption is the process of converting plaintext data into unreadable ciphertext to protect it from unauthorized access.

span.data-narration: Uses the same key for encryption and decryption.

li.span: Uses the same key for encryption and decryption.

span.data-narration: Uses a pair of keys, one public and one private, for encryption and decryption.

li.span: Uses a pair of keys, one public and one private, for encryption and decryption.

span.data-narration: Divides plaintext into fixed-length blocks and encrypts each block independently.

li.span: Divides plaintext into fixed-length blocks and encrypts each block independently.

span.data-narration: Encrypts plaintext in a continuous stream of bits.

li.span: Encrypts plaintext in a continuous stream of bits.

span.data-narration: Secure key generation, distribution, and revocation.

li.span: Secure key generation, distribution, and revocation.

span.data-narration: Encryption and decryption processes can be computationally intensive.

li.span: Encryption and decryption processes can be computationally intensive.

span.data-narration: Encryption is used to protect credit card information and other sensitive data.

li.span: Encryption is used to protect credit card information and other sensitive data.

span.data-narration: Encryption is used to protect email, instant messaging, and voice communications.

li.span: Encryption is used to protect email, instant messaging, and voice communications.

p.data-narration: Suppose we want to encrypt the plaintext message "HELLO" using the AES symmetric key encryption algorithm.

div.p: Suppose we want to encrypt the plaintext message "HELLO" using the AES symmetric key encryption algorithm.

span.data-narration: Divide the plaintext into 4 fixed-length blocks.

li.span: Divide the plaintext into 4 fixed-length blocks.
